title: SpatialArtifacts: a computational framework for tissue artifact detection in spatial transcriptomics data.
publicationName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
journalName: bioRxiv : the preprint server for biology
snippet: Spatial transcriptomics data are frequently compromised by technical artifacts, such as dry patches, tissue lifting, and uneven reagent coverage, which manifests as regions with low UMI counts, in particular at tissue borders. It can often be challenging to identify these regions using existing quality control methods. Here, we present SpatialArtifacts , a....
